analytics.name: analytics
analytics.description: SQL query execution against Databricks SQL Warehouses

required.description: SQL Warehouse for executing analytics queries

lakebase.name: lakebase
lakebase.description: SQL query execution against Databricks Lakebase Autoscaling

required.description: Lakebase Postgres database for persistent storage

branch.description: Full Lakebase Postgres branch resource name. Obtain by running `databricks postgres list-branches projects/{project-id}`, select the desired item from the output array and use its .name value.

database.description: Full Lakebase Postgres database resource name. Obtain by running `databricks postgres list-databases {branch-name}`, select the desired item from the output array and use its .name value. Requires the branch resource name.

endpoint.description: Lakebase endpoint resource name. Auto-injected at runtime via app.yaml valueFrom: postgres. For local development, obtain by running `databricks postgres list-endpoints {branch-name}`, select the desired item from the output array and use its .name value.

server.name: server
server.description: HTTP server with Express, static file serving, and Vite dev mode support
